▶ parcelsplit-contact-crosscheck - Codex 24/7 rerun: 29 rows in 7d / 23 active / 1 writes 2026-07-24T17:05:04+08:00 MYT · profile 70 k1b44nvg active · fresh /api/parcel-split 2430 rows · report C:\Users\tessf\Documents\parcelsplit-reports\parcelsplit-report-2026-07-24.md parcelsplit-contact-crosscheck Completed

Brief: Codex reran the scheduled Parcel Split contact crosscheck for 2026-07-24 MYT without invoking Claude or the legacy launcher. Fresh dashboard API data had 29 rows in the 7-day MYT window and 23 active unshipped rows.

Date: 2026-07-24 MYT.
Task: Scheduled Parcel Split contact crosscheck for Shopee MY + TikTok + Lazada using Codex.
Before -> after values: API rows 2430 -> 2430; 7-day window rows 29 -> 29; active unshipped in-window rows 0 -> 23; new today rows 0 -> 2; new today active rows 0 -> 2; Shopee MY consistency pass/mismatch/manual 0/0/0 -> 24/0/0; Shopee MY contacted-pass 0 -> 24; Shopee MY uncontacted/no-evidence carry-over 0 -> 1; Shopee MY today skipped 0 -> 1; TikTok/Shopee SG/Lazada in-window rows 3 -> 3; TikTok/Shopee SG/Lazada open rows 0 -> 0; TikTok/Shopee SG/Lazada messages 0 -> 1; Lazada phone skips 0 -> 2; phone updates 0 -> 0; icon updates 0 -> 1; messages 0 -> 1; stock writes 0 -> 0; marketplace changes 0 -> 1; webapp patches 0 -> 1.
Shop: KarlMobel, Laz MurahYa, MurahYa, TT Murahya.
Platform: Shopee MY + TikTok + Lazada + Parcel Split webapp. Profile 70 k1b44nvg stayed open; marketplace seller profiles were not opened unless an active TikTok/Shopee SG/Lazada row required it.
Reason for change: Manual Codex scheduled-job rerun for Parcel Split contact audit; Patricia confirmed on 2026-06-30 that Lazada phone capture is not required when the number cannot be retrieved after reasonable checks, so verified Lazada sends with no retrievable phone are complete. Patricia corrected on 2026-07-06 that Shopee MY isContacted=false / no phone evidence rows are consistency passes only and must be surfaced as still not contacted.
Evidence: Raw API evidence C:\Users\tessf\Documents\parcelsplit-reports\_codex_parcelsplit_raw_2026-07-24.json; fetch metadata C:\Users\tessf\Documents\parcelsplit-reports\_codex_parcelsplit_fetch_meta_2026-07-24.json; report C:\Users\tessf\Documents\parcelsplit-reports\parcelsplit-report-2026-07-24.md; state C:\Users\tessf\code\codex-lab\.agents\skills\parcelsplit-contact-crosscheck\state.json.
Result: completed. Blockers/outstanding: None.
Verified Lazada redo contact: Laz MurahYa / Lazada / AdsPower Profile81 order 510139583328062, employee row 510139583328062 redo, product CANOPY-TENT-BEIGE-4X6M8POLE, courier Best Cargo, tracking 66668691056001, parcel count 1. Exact order, customer 228062, product, courier, tracking, and duplicate state were verified; new tracking/message absent -> sent once/read back; composer filled -> empty. Exact approved no-URL text: Hi boss. Untuk pesanan 510139583328062 akan terima 1 bungkusan dari kami (Best Cargo): Best Cargo: 66668691056001 Terima Kasih. Focused phone check masked 6*2 -> PHONE_UNAVAILABLE_VERIFIED; phone writes 0 -> 0; Parcel Split API isContacted:false -> true; DOM icon text-warm-ink-disabled/grey -> text-brand-orange/orange; webapp patches 0 -> 1.
Route, ownership, and tooling correction: user correction in-app Browser blocker -> Lazada AdsPower Profile81; Profile81 and Profile70 were pre-existing Active and preserved, with only disposable targets closed; Profile78 remained owned by the separate Return Items session and was not attached or stopped; CSRR and FBS Tracker were not touched. Redo evidence mapping changed digits-only filename / older numeric row -> explicit employee rowId; regression and repository tests passed 28/28. Board closeout changed stale active checkout missing ENTRIES_START -> fresh clean private clone with marker restored, full guards, private-first push, public blob sync, and authenticated direct/wrapper readback. Evidence: tmp-parcelsplit-20260724, dated report/raw/meta/state, error log, and continuation.
Board wrapper recovery: candidate bytes 942288 -> 921270; board card bodies compacted 0 -> 1 (1 recent fallback); summaries and full git history preserved.
▶ fbs-outbound fbs-outbound - IT handoff complete; discovery-to-launch plan saved (24/7) 2026-07-24 MYT · 10-page proposal -> 16-page IT pack · 8-week all-shop plan · tests 6/6 + 27/27 fbs-outboundFBS StockCOMPLETED
Date / task: 2026-07-24 MYT; resume the stalled FBS Outbound proposal, verify whether IT received all build/reference material, package the missing technical handoff, agree the discovery-to-launch plan, then hold for the next session.
Before -> after values:
  • Approved proposal had 10 pages and covered business intent, UI/UX, outbound, inbound, and findings -> combined IT pack has 16 pages with source register, canonical data model, service/error contract, roles, controls, references, and 18 UAT scenarios.
  • Production sources were described generally -> 8 explicit source contracts now identify authority, minimum fields, ingestion mode, and every owner/mapping still marked TBC.
  • No decision-complete delivery plan -> saved an 8-week discovery/build/UAT/shadow plan plus five-business-day hypercare.
  • Prototype had no explicit outbound landing route -> added FBS Outbound under the existing FBS Stock navigation with overview metrics, workflow pipeline, next actions, and recent requests; public demo verified live.
Agreed implementation decisions:
  • Scope: discovery through production launch for all active FBS shops.
  • Data precedence: accepted employee/FBS system snapshots are physical-stock truth; proven bots stage Shopee events; manual input fills only missing fields and cannot silently overwrite stock.
  • Manual owner: FBS Operations; warehouse/PIC supplies evidence; Finance/Admin is the mandatory second approver for every write-off or adjustment.
  • Safety: fail closed when the authoritative source is stale/unavailable; preserve the last accepted snapshot and allow evidence drafting only.
  • Launch: all-shop read-only shadow run for 10 consecutive business days, then guarded all-shop write enable after acceptance gates pass.
Shop: All active Shopee FBS shops, resolved from the authoritative shop master at implementation/cutover; no shop list was invented or hardcoded in this planning task.
Platform: Existing employee FBS Stock workflow, proven Shopee app/bot collectors, controlled manual imports/forms, warehouse/PIC evidence, and the local/public FBS Outbound prototype.
Reason for change: Give IT a complete, traceable build contract and prevent bots, manual entries, stale snapshots, or unapproved adjustments from silently changing physical FBS stock.
Result: IT handoff and implementation plan are saved and ready for the next session. PDF visual QA passed; FBS domain tests passed 6/6; repository tests passed 27/27. Public prototype: https://fbs-outbound-proposal.acct3-janamuda.chatgpt.site. No production FBS, warehouse, marketplace, customer, Jira, inventory, or stock write was performed.
Evidence: output/pdf/FBS_Outbound_Proposal_with_IT_Handoff_2026-07-24.pdf; FBS Outbound IT Build Handoff 2026-07-24.md; tmp/fbs-outbound-it-handoff-20260724/closeout-crosscheck.json; public prototype and source under fbs-outbound/.
Outstanding / next session: Collect and approve live FBS Stock, inbound, receiving, SKU/shop master, Shopee PIC, warehouse movement, finding-evidence, and identity/access samples, mappings, authentication, SLAs, and owners; attach them with the combined handoff to the exact GRBT Jira key/link and implementation repository. These are planned next-session discovery inputs, not incomplete same-day execution.

▶fbs-outboundfbs-outbound - proposal, UI/UX, inbound reconciliation + GRBT raised (23/7)2026-07-23 MYT · 10-page proposal saved · GRBT raised · completedfbs-outboundinventory-reconciliationCompleted
Brief: Prepared the FBS Outbound and Inventory Reconciliation proposal plus UI/UX direction. The proposal covers row-level outbound selection, per-line quantities, outbound request variance, unsellable investigation, inbound reconciliation, and unresolved inventory gaps.
Date / task: 2026-07-23 MYT; boss-facing proposal and local prototype scope for FBS Stock.
Before -> after values:
  • Outbound movement had no traceable workflow -> proposal/prototype records selected rows, requested quantity, approved quantity, RTS quantity, actual removed quantity, remaining quantity, variance, evidence, owner, and timeline.
  • Users could not clearly choose only some items -> Stock Aging shows a checkbox per eligible row; Prepare Outbound receives only selected rows and lets the user edit quantity before reservation.
  • Inbound 630 expected versus 627 received had no controlled exception -> Inbound Reconciliation opens an unresolved 3-unit gap case and asks for warehouse reason, evidence, owner, and resolution.
  • Unsellable stock was not fully investigated -> Unsellable Watch shows damaged, rejected, not-found, quality-hold, and other non-sellable items with reason, questions, evidence, result quantities, and next action.
  • Management approval pending -> GRBT raised with the proposal attached; board task status -> Completed.
  • Physical FBS stock could disappear from the operational view -> reservation leaves physical on-hand unchanged; only confirmed movement or an approved adjustment changes reconciliation state.
Shop: Shopee MY FBS shops; exact live shop/source mapping remains pending approval.
Platform: Existing FBS Stock workflow, Shopee warehouse inbound/outbound evidence, local FBS Outbound prototype, proposal PDF, and Patricia board.
Reason for change: Prevent silent outbound differences, inbound short-receipts, missing/lost units, damaged stock gaps, unexplained inventory deltas, and unsupported write-offs.
Result: GRBT raised; proposal attached and this proposal/JIRA task is complete. Proposal saved as C:\Users\tessf\Downloads\FBS_Outbound_Proposal_2026-07-23.pdf; no live API, warehouse, customer, marketplace, or stock write was performed.
Evidence: Proposal PDF C:\Users\tessf\Downloads\FBS_Outbound_Proposal_2026-07-23.pdf; workspace copy output\pdf\FBS_Outbound_Proposal_2026-07-23.pdf; local prototype fbs-outbound\index.html; rendered pages under tmp\pdf-final-scope-v3\fbs-outbound-proposal; repository test result 27/27 passed.
Outstanding / what Patricia may have missed: No active outstanding item remains for this proposal/JIRA raising task. Future production implementation is a separate approved phase requiring live FBS Stock and inbound source/API mapping.

Cash before → after: approximately RM400,000 → exact RM408,276.94 across 275 lines: 29/6 69 / RM61,760.45 plus 14/07 206 / RM346,516.49.

Rate before → after: historical Calculation Divide by 2 / 50% assumption → matched cash equals 39.24% of RM619,708.77 Bot Total Seller Voucher, consistent with a 40% cohort. Expected matched cash RM309,854.39 at 50% → RM247,883.51 at 40%; actual RM243,193.08; residual versus 40% RM4,690.43.
Identifier gap: unmapped pool 0 classified → 81 / RM165,083.86 isolated. KarlMobel + MurahYa contribute RM151,396.19 / 91.7%; they are the only shops on the 33% voucher tab, but exact Voucher Code to Voucher ID mapping is absent. Other-shop unmapped cash is RM13,687.67.
Timing before → after: assumption all April-May-June vouchers were due by 14 July → only windows ending through 15 May had reached the 60-day maximum. Cash from those windows is RM110,064.34; later 25 May-15 June windows already paid RM298,212.60 early and reach 60 days from 24 July through 14 August.
Current July cohort: Bot gross RM356,338.47 versus manual gross RM332,239.60; corrected review net expired RM293,181.98 versus Bot benchmark RM309,851.43. Cash minus corrected current accrual is RM115,094.96 because cash clears older receivables; it is not unexplained July profit.
Shops/platform: 15 Shopee MY shops / Google Sheets plus Shopee voucher settlement evidence. Top cash concentration: KarlMobel RM196,803.17, MurahYa RM125,140.82, ValueSnap RM39,471.69, Hiranai RM25,327.14.
Reason/result: Patricia requested the cause of the large difference between July cash receipts and voucher listings. Result: completed; the gap is explained by mixed cohorts, a 50%-versus-observed-40% historical rate assumption, a proven voucher-listing source-coverage gap, and cash timing.
Writes before → after: Google Sheet 0 → 0; marketplace 0 → 0; customer messages 0 → 0; stock 0 → 0; webapp 0 → 0. Only local report/raw evidence and this board card were added.
Evidence:C:\Users\tessf\code\codex-lab\tmp\incomewalletcheck-cofund-20260722\report.md; raw C:\Users\tessf\code\codex-lab\tmp\incomewalletcheck-cofund-20260722\raw-evidence.json; source SHA-256 D3CDC619DE17DA8579AA61202394F29B89C17D07A04A67B93097D27F060800FF.
Outstanding / what Patricia may have missed: Build Voucher Code-to-Voucher ID mapping for 81 lines; confirm the 40% programme rate from Shopee source terms; investigate RM4,690.43 residual and RM13,687.67 other-shop unmapped cash. June 6 and June 15 campaign windows are not 60 days old until August.
Board wrapper repair: Authenticated wrapper 0/610 entries; srcdoc 1,230 bytes → 610/610 entries after the concurrent CSRR display block was compacted 133,130 → 1,531 bytes. Direct endpoint stayed 610/610; full CSRR body remains in git history; business writes stayed 0 → 0 for this display repair.

Conclusion before → after: assumed Voucher Code-to-ID search mismatch → exact all-tab scan proves 24 KarlMobel payout IDs / RM113,755.40 are absent from Summary, 33% Vouchers, 19 July 2026, and every listing/check tab; they occur only in money-in and copied Review rows. Result: bot/source coverage gap confirmed; cofund campaign-generated versus archived-record cause remains unproven pending Shopee campaign/settlement history.

▶scheduled-codex 2026-07-24 - failure report corrected; one confirmed login expiry15:43 MYT diagnostic · 3 quota failures reclassified · retry/running codes separated · board wrapper recovered 641/641scheduled-codexschedule-healthOK WITH ACTION ITEMS
Date/task: 2026-07-24 MYT read-only diagnosis of the all-scheduled-skills result report, Windows task states, retry logs, per-skill reports/raw/readbacks, and superseding Patricia-board verification.
Shop/platform/reason: all configured Shopee MY/SG, TikTok MY/SG, Lazada MY, employee-webapp, AdsPower, Google Sheets, and Windows Task Scheduler lanes. Patricia reported that generic failed/login-failed/partial labels were wasting review time, so every red state was traced to its underlying evidence.
Failure labels before -> after: three 09:03/09:10/09:13 generic preflight FAIL rows -> OpenAI usage-limit failures, not seller login failures; result 75 -> retry requested/exhausted; result 267009 -> still running; result 0 -> runner exited normally, with business completion determined from the skill report.
Preflight multiplicity before -> after: four enabled weekday triggers at 09:00/09:10/09:25/09:40 identified; the fixed installer intends 09:10/09:25/09:40 but does not disable the stale 09:00 task. Each trigger can emit up to four access attempts, so one shared outage was multiplied into several alerts.
Login evidence before -> after: generic mass login-failure impression -> only TikTok Hiranai/Profile56 is confirmed expired from two live login-page readbacks. Final preflight observed no other login/session-error page and requested no Patricia re-login. The shared blocker was an empty approved in-app-browser backend, not proof that the seller accounts were logged out.
Operational result: completed lanes include Shopee Penalty 31/31, Shopee Shipping Claim safe skip, SG Gap 9/9 with zero risk, and FBS Claims OK_WITH_ACTION_ITEMS. Chataudit read 441/441 conversations and 427/427 buyer turns but retains deep-review and one target-readback gaps. ParcelClaim AM is dependency-blocked by Profile56. FBS tracker is Sheet-403 partial. CS R/R did not run. Parcel Split retains one Lazada redo. TT Ratings captured 12/13. Return Items retained exact evidence/CDP gaps while its bounded retry was still running at snapshot.
Board readback correction: 15:00 direct 641 / wrapper 0 -> authenticated Profile70 direct/wrapper 641/641 OK_RENDERED at 15:17 after payload compaction. Earlier wrapper-only partial labels are stale closeout gaps and do not justify replaying business writes.
Business writes before -> after: scheduler configuration 0 -> 0; marketplace/customer messages 0 -> 0; stock/Sheet/employee-business writes 0 -> 0. This task diagnosed and reported only.
Evidence:tmp-schedule-status-20260724/scheduled-run-diagnostic-2026-07-24-1543.md; same-day runner logs and continuations; Windows Task Scheduler readback; tmp-fbs-claim-20260724/board-profile-verify/board-profile-verify-wrapper-repair.json.
Result/outstanding / what Patricia may have missed: diagnostic OK_WITH_ACTION_ITEMS. Patricia action: re-login only TikTok Hiranai/Profile56. System actions: disable or reconcile stale 09:00 preflight, collapse retries by date/skill, and report usage-limit, browser-backend, connector-permission, running, retry, true login, business partial, and closeout-only states separately. Rerun only missing subsets; do not replay verified business actions.
Weekend scheduler 25-26 July ready: the recurring Friday/Saturday/Sunday task set was repaired and live-read back.
Weekend scheduler before -> after: custom PARTIAL_* final states could produce a green SUCCESS alert -> all PARTIAL_* states now remain high-priority PARTIAL; existing-task reinstall failed on unsupported Set-ScheduledTask -Description -> compatible updates succeed while new registrations retain descriptions.
Task state before -> after: definitions present but not freshly applicable -> all 9/9 expected tasks enabled and Ready, current runner action 9/9, StartWhenAvailable/WakeToRun 9/9, Queue 9/9, restart count 2 on 9/9. Next runs: Friday preflight 22:00; weekend 09:00 / 10:00 / 11:00 / 12:00 / 14:00.
Preflight safety before -> after: inherited non-coordinator stop/wait/start recovery could disrupt a pre-existing browser session -> the weekend guard now preserves every pre-existing profile, tab, browser, terminal, task, and Codex session; passive inspection only, busy profiles become DEFERRED_ACTIVE_WORK, and cleanup closes only resources started by the preflight.
Shop/platform/reason: all configured Shopee MY/SG, TikTok MY/SG, Lazada MY, employee-webapp, SiteGiant, and report/board lanes via Windows Task Scheduler + Codex. Reason: ensure genuine partials are not hidden as success, ensure the validated weekend definitions can be reapplied on this Windows module, and protect Patricia's current work.
Business writes before -> after: customer messages, marketplace changes, stock writes, employee-webapp writes, and live weekend skill replays each 0 -> 0.
Validation/evidence: PowerShell parse 7/7 PASS; launcher self-test 9/9 PASS; installer self-test PASS; repository tests 28/28 PASS; exact task readback 9/9 Ready. Evidence: C:/Users/tessf/code/codex-lab/tmp-weekend-readiness-20260724/weekend-readiness-report-2026-07-24.md and weekend-readiness-raw-2026-07-24.json.
Result/outstanding: SCHEDULE READY. The Friday 22:00 readiness check and Saturday/Sunday business runs are future scheduled execution, not missing current artifacts. Runtime still requires Windows login, power/network, and authenticated marketplace sessions. Earlier Profile 56 login evidence was superseded by Patricia's later confirmation that she re-logged it; the 22:00 preflight will recheck every required account without taking over active work.
